name: WhatsApp (waclaw)
description: WhatsApp channel plugin via waclaw proxy

connectorToken.description: Connector token from the waclaw proxy admin API

defaultTo.description: Default WhatsApp recipient for native outbound sends (e.g. cron announce). Full E.164 with leading '+' — e.g. '+12025550123'. The '+' is stripped by the proxy before forwarding to the Meta Graph API.
